title: contact_set: non-string displayName update silently no-ops for unknown ID
description: store.set_contact_display_name bumps state and returns Ok(()) even when no row was matched (rows_affected == 0). Trigger: ChatContact/set update with displayName on a nonexistent ID. Bad behavior: response says updated[id]=null and state token is bumped, but no write occurred. Client believes the update succeeded. set_contact_display_name should check rows_affected and return Ok(bool) like the other contact update methods.
close_reason: Fixed in daemon/src/store.rs and daemon/src/jmap.rs; 7 new regression tests added
